content: Acme Corp: Team plan, annual contract. Renewal Q3 2026. Decision-maker: Sarah Chen (VP Engineering, budget owner). Closed a 5-seat expansion 2026-04-12 with a 15% volume discount (~$24k ARR added). Renewal date unchanged. Acme acquired BluePeak last quarter — possible 10-seat Q3 expansion vector once BluePeak engineering integrates.
summary: Acme: Team plan, renewal Q3 2026, DM Sarah Chen. +5-seat expansion closed 2026-04-12 (15% disc, +$24k ARR). BluePeak acquisition = potential +10 seats Q3.

content: Sarah Chen (Acme) prefers Tuesday 10am PT meetings, capped at 30 minutes. Never schedule on Mondays — internal Acme board day. Email-only for Sarah; she explicitly opted out of Slack for vendor comms.
summary: Sarah Chen: Tue 10am PT, 30-min cap, no Mondays, email-only.

content: BetaTech: in negotiation as of late April. Procurement contact David Kim (david.kim@betatech.io). SOC 2 Type II report sent 2026-03-08, cleared their legal 2026-04-22. David asked for 20% multi-year discount; counter-offered 12% over 2 years. Order form expected 2026-05-10. Tech feedback from earlier demo: liked provenance + ranking explanation, asked for an SLA-breach worked scenario, wants Linear-handoff workflow.
summary: BetaTech: David Kim (procurement). SOC 2 cleared 2026-04-22. Negotiating 12%/2yr (vs his ask 20%/multi-yr). Order form due 2026-05-10. Wants SLA-breach demo + Linear handoff.

content: David Kim (BetaTech procurement) prefers email-only for vendor communications. Slack and phone are off-limits.
summary: David Kim: email-only.

content: Cirrus Robotics: churned end of January 2026 (reason: per-subject metering didn't fit fleet-wide robotics use case). Closing exec was former CTO Liam Park (since departed). Win-back signal 2026-03-25: new VP Engineering Zara Patel surfaced after a LinkedIn post about 'rebuilding our AI memory layer.' Re-eval call 2026-03-31 reframed scope as per-robot memory (now a fit). Kickoff scope call 2026-04-08: 200-robot EU pilot, 60-day PoC against recall@5 on prior-state retrieval. Conversion estimated +$22k ARR.
summary: Cirrus: churned Jan 2026 → win-back via VP Zara Patel. Per-robot scope (200 robots, EU). 60-day PoC, recall@5 success metric. ~$22k ARR if converted.

content: Cirrus competitive note: Zara mentioned Mem0 quoted lower but lacked deterministic ranking. Determinism is the wedge — emphasise reproducibility and the ranking formula in any pricing pushback.
summary: Cirrus competitive wedge vs Mem0: deterministic ranking (Mem0 quoted lower but non-deterministic).

content: Delta Health: HIPAA-regulated, BAA-required prospect. Tech contact: Dr. Janelle Martinez (CMIO). Use case: triage-assistant memory across patient encounters. Security questionnaire (84 questions) returned 2026-04-14. BAA approved by our legal 2026-04-25 and sent to Delta; PoC kickoff awaits Delta counter-signature (ETA 2026-05-05). Conversion not yet forecast.
summary: Delta Health: HIPAA, BAA-required. CMIO Dr. Janelle Martinez. Questionnaire (84) returned 2026-04-14. BAA sent 2026-04-25; PoC kickoff ETA 2026-05-05.

content: Tom works in HubSpot exclusively. Don't suggest Salesforce playbooks, custom fields, or workflows — translate any reference into HubSpot equivalents.
summary: HubSpot only — no Salesforce playbooks/fields/workflows.

content: Tom uses email for prospect comms (especially procurement contacts) and Slack for internal coordination only. Default any draft to email when the recipient is external.
summary: External = email. Slack = internal only.

content: AE routing for handoff packs: Marco is AE on Acme + Cirrus; Priya M. is AE on BetaTech + Delta Health. When preparing a handoff pack, address it to the correct AE.
summary: AE routing: Marco → Acme/Cirrus; Priya M. → BetaTech/Delta.

content: Pipeline summary entering May 2026: $94k ARR closing this quarter. Acme +$24k expansion closed 2026-04-12. BetaTech +$48k expected by 2026-05-10. Cirrus +$22k pending PoC conversion. Delta Health PoC starts 2026-05-05; conversion unforecast.
summary: Q closing: $94k ARR. Acme +$24k (closed). BetaTech +$48k (5/10). Cirrus +$22k (PoC). Delta = TBD.

content: Acme expansion vector: Sarah Chen flagged 2026-05-02 that BluePeak engineering integration is happening sooner than expected — possible 10-seat opportunity in Q3 alongside renewal. Sarah agreed to introduce Tom to BluePeak's eng lead. Track this intro in the open loop.
summary: Open loop: Sarah Chen → BluePeak eng lead intro. Possible +10 seats Q3 alongside renewal.

content: When pitching against Mem0, lead with deterministic ranking + provenance traceability. Cirrus surfaced this gap directly. Don't compete on raw price — Mem0 will quote lower; the wedge is reproducibility for engineering teams that need eval-driven memory.
summary: vs Mem0: lead with deterministic ranking + provenance, never on price.

content: When a prospect is HIPAA-regulated (e.g. Delta Health), the procurement order is: discovery → security questionnaire → BAA from our legal → counter-sig → PoC kickoff. Don't book a PoC kickoff before the BAA is counter-signed. PII handling story must be ready by the discovery call.
summary: HIPAA prospects: BAA must be counter-signed before PoC kickoff.
